description: Verify multiple @optional annotations make all specified parameters nullable
name: optional_multiple
query_sql:
-- @name SearchOrders
-- @returns :many
-- @optional status
-- @optional user_id
SELECT id, total FROM orders WHERE status = $1 AND user_id = $2;
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active');
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, total NUMERIC(10,2), status TEXT);
